title: Golden Crispy Canadian Italian Sausage Wrap
description: A comforting Canadian dish featuring Italian fennel sausages in a crispy pandan leaf wrap, this Golden Crispy Canadian Italian Sausage Wrap is a high-protein friendly meal with a pungent and crispy twist.
instructions: Cook the Italian fennel sausages in a large skillet over medium-high heat until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Wrap each cooked sausage in a pandan leaf, securing with a toothpick if necessary.
In a separate saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat and whisk in the all purpose flour to make a roux.
Slowly pour in the mother sauce, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the sauce to a simmer and cook until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the grated mozzarella cheese until melted and smooth.
Season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
Place a cooked sausage in the center of each pandan leaf wrap, spoon some of the cheese sauce over the sausage, and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Serve the Golden Crispy Canadian Italian Sausage Wraps hot and enjoy.
